scope.target: Portable, fail-closed execution of the sanctioned v0.5.0 pre-tag critical gate
constraints: Keep the critical command allowlist exact
Decode subprocess bytes deterministically without reader-thread failures
Return deterministic failure details even when streams are empty
Keep v0.4.2 as an exact automatic upgrade source
Do not create or publish a tag
non_goals: Change release compatibility or migration semantics

steps: Merge and prove the real pre-tag command on main
Close lifecycle records on a continuation branch
validation: hosted package, governance, and Ubuntu gates
execution.last_completed_step: Registered PTP-001 after reproducing the Windows decode crash on merged main@3c3a66c.
execution.next_action: Implement deterministic byte decoding and focused regression fixtures.

results.residual_risk: Until merged-main pre-tag passes, v0.5.0 is not release-ready.
